root_text.iti98:2.3: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ dānānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammadānaṁ.
root_text.iti98:3.3: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ saṁvibhāgānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammasaṁvibhāgo.
root_text.iti98:4.3: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ anuggahānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammānuggaho”ti.
root_text.iti98:5.4: Viññū pajānaṁ ko na yajetha kāle.
root_text.iti98:7.1: Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.

translation_text.iti98:1.1: This was said by the Buddha, the Perfected One: that is what I heard.
translation_text.iti98:2.2: A gift of things of the flesh and a gift of the teaching.
translation_text.iti98:2.3: The better of these two gifts is the gift of the teaching.
translation_text.iti98:3.1: There are these two kinds of sharing.
translation_text.iti98:3.2: Sharing things of the flesh and sharing the teaching.
translation_text.iti98:3.3: The better of these two kinds of sharing is sharing the teaching.
translation_text.iti98:4.1: There are these two kinds of support.
translation_text.iti98:4.2: Support in things of the flesh and support in the teaching.
translation_text.iti98:4.3: The better of these two kinds of support is support in the teaching.”
translation_text.iti98:5.1: “It is said to be the supreme, ultimate gift,
translation_text.iti98:5.2: and the sharing praised by the Buddha;
translation_text.iti98:5.3: what wise and sensible person, <j>confident in the best of fields,
translation_text.iti98:5.4: would not sow a such timely gift?
translation_text.iti98:6.1: For those who are diligent <j>in the dispensation of the Holy One,
translation_text.iti98:6.2: both those who speak and those who listen,
translation_text.iti98:6.3: confident in the dispensation of the Holy One,
translation_text.iti98:6.4: such a gift purifies the highest goal.”
translation_text.iti98:7.1: This too is a matter that was spoken by the Blessed One: that is what I heard.
